description: Animates rotating the ruler around its midpoint by a given angle in degrees
utility: Rotate the ruler orientation before drawing

examples.scenario: Rotate ruler 45 degrees then draw a diagonal line
examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); rulerrotate(G, 45); rulerline(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 5, 5))
